channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Kosovo elections will decide who will lead stalled talks with Serbia and manage a battered economy
item.description: Kosovo goes to the polls Sunday in a parliamentary election expected to be a key test for Prime Minister Albin Kurti after his party won in a landslide four years ago.
item.dc:creator: Florent Bajrami And Llazar Semini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US importers stockpile Italian Prosecco as a hedge against possible Trump tariffs
item.description: American importers have been stockpiling the popular Italian bubbly Prosecco as a hedge against the possible impact of tariffs threatened by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Paolo Santalucia, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A Russian spy ship caught fire off Syria's coast, officials say. Here's audio of its broadcasts
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The man is insistent: Our ship is in difficulty, so keep your distance, he instructs another vessel over the radio. “Warship on your course,” he says. "I am drifting. I’m not under command.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Egypt lobbies against Trump plan to empty Gaza of Palestinians as Israel prepares for it
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Israel says it has begun preparations for the departure of Palestinians from Gaza despite international rejection of President Donald Trump’s plan to empty the territory of its population.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US border czar blames leaks for hindering immigration raids in Colorado suburb spotlighted by Trump
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Donald Trump's border czar on Thursday blamed news media leaks for hindering a large-scale operation in a Denver suburb the president has held up in his efforts to link violent crime with immigration.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, THOMAS PEIPERT, JESSE BEDAYN and MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump administration slashing USAID workforce to fewer than 300 employees: Reports
item.description: The government's foremost foreign aid agency is being gutted. The U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) workforce is being slashed from more than 10,000 employees to fewer than 300, according to reports published in Wired, Reuters, The New York Times and NPR.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: Panama president to speak to Trump amid canal tension
item.description: Panamanian President José Raúl Mulino said he is scheduled to speak with President Trump on Friday amid his efforts to reclaim the nation’s sought-after canal. “I was told a few minutes ago by a senior official that I will be speaking with President Trump tomorrow at 3:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: US service member, 3 contractors killed in surveillance mission plane crash in southern Philippines
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — One U.S. service member and three defense contractors were killed Thursday when a plane contracted by the U.S. military crashed in a rice field in the southern Philippines, U.S. Indo-Pacific Command said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US military surveillance flight crashes in Philippines, killing 4
item.description: A U.S. military service member and three defense contractors died Thursday in the Philippines after their surveillance flight crashed, officials say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panama's president: No deal to allow US warships to use canal for free
item.description: Panamanian President José Raúl Mulino on Thursday rejected U.S. claims that American warships and boats can transit the Panama Canal without paying a standard fee.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, The Hill

item.title: Bill Gates hopeful Trump will see 'moral and strategic value' in AIDS relief program
item.description: Billionaire philanthropist Bill Gates in an interview Wednesday said he hopes President Trump sees the value in preserving the President's Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief (PEPFAR) program, which has saved more than 25 million lives since it launched in 2003.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Trump doubles down on Gaza Strip idea, says no US soldiers would be needed
item.description: President Trump on Thursday doubled down on his proposal for the U.S. to take control of the Gaza Strip and rebuild it, despite pushback from Arab leaders and some Republicans, arguing it would not require American troops.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Ukraine wants partner countries to join in postwar development worth billions
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine wants to collaborate with partner countries on postwar projects worth billions of dollars not just in mining rare earth elements, but also in energy and construction sectors to help rebuild the country, Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ILLIA NOVIKOV, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Philippine Vice President Duterte impeached over Marcos assassination remark and other allegations
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte was impeached Wednesday on a range of accusations that include plotting to assassinate the president, large-scale corruption and failing to strongly denounce China's aggressive actions against Filipino forces in the disputed South Chi
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rwanda-backed rebels have seized another town in eastern Congo
item.description: GOMA, Congo (AP) — Rwanda-backed rebels gained ground in eastern Congo on Wednesday despite the unilateral ceasefire they declared earlier this week, taking control of a town 100 kilometers (60 miles) from the provincial capital of Bukavu, civil society officials and residents told The Associated Pr
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN KABUMBA, JEAN-YVES KAMALE and MONIKA PRONCZUK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Earthquakes are rattling Greece's volcanic island of Santorini: What we know
item.description: Although Greece is no stranger to earthquakes, seismic activity of such frequency and intensity without having been preceded by a major quake is unusual, seismologists say.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump's Gaza plan has stunned the region. Here's a look at the serious obstacles it faces
item.description: President Donald Trump's stunning proposal to forcibly transfer hundreds of thousands of Palestinians out of the Gaza Strip and develop it as a tourist destination faces major obstacles.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH KRAUSS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US allies, adversaries reject Trump suggestion to 'take over' Gaza Strip
item.description: When the president was asked about possibly sending in U.S. troops to Gaza, he said America will “do what is necessary.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: The history of Gaza amid Trump's plan to rebuild enclave
item.description: President Donald Trump’s controversial plan to relocate Gaza’s population and rebuild it as the "Riviera of the Middle East" sparks global debate, echoing Gaza’s history of displacement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USPS lifts suspension of Hong Kong and China parcels
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service reversed course Wednesday, saying it would continue to accept all inbound mail and packages from China and Hong Kong.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UN chief sounds the alarm amid fears over possible DOGE-inspired cuts after Trump's order
item.description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres sends a letter to U.N. staff as President Donald Trump makes sweeping changes to U.S. foreign aid and funding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saudi Arabia contradicts Trump, vows no ties with Israel without creation of Palestinian state
item.description: Saudi Arabia said it would not establish ties with Israel unless a Palestinian state is created, contradicting a suggestion from U.S. President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White House flags top USAID boondoggles under Elon Musk's microscope
item.description: The White House has released a list of USAID programs its considers wasteful and that it says abused taxpayer funds by backing programs that supported DEI initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Greek island Santorini evacuated after earthquakes shake tourist destination
item.description: Hundreds of earthquakes that have rattled the Greek islands since last week have prompted the evacuation of thousands from the tourist hotspot of Santorini.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Denmark PM repeats Greenland ‘not for sale,’ but would welcome more American troops on Arctic island
item.description: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen said she would welcome President Donald Trump sending more U.S. troops to Greenland, which is "not for sale.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Robert Levinson disappearance: FBI releases posters seeking info on two Iranian intelligence officers
item.description: The FBI is seeking information on two senior Iranian intelligence officers involved in the 2007 abduction of American Robert Levinson.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Uganda starts clinical trial of vaccine for Sudan strain of Ebola amid new outbreak
item.description: Uganda has begun a clinical trial of a vaccine against the Sudan strain of Ebola following an outbreak that has killed one nurse in the east African country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China hits US with retaliatory tariffs
item.description: China hit the U.S. back with retaliatory tariffs across the board over President Trump’s enforcement of tariffs on Chinese goods that went into effect on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: PM declares 'worst mass shooting in Swedish history' after gunman kills 10 on school campus
item.description: Swedish police are responding to a school shooting in Orebro, Sweden, on Tuesday after reports said at least 10 people were killed
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants rare earth elements from Ukraine in exchange for military aid
item.description: “We're looking to do a deal with Ukraine, where they're going to secure what we're giving them with their rare earth and other things,” he told reporters.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, WGN 9

item.title: El Salvador agrees to accept US deportees of any nationality following meeting with Rubio
item.description: El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele has offered to accept convicted criminals of any nationality the U.S. wants to deport and house them in his country's prison system.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian teenager dies in devastating shark attack, nearly 100 yards from popular beach: report
item.description: An Australian teenager from near Brisbane died on Monday after being bitten by a shark nearly 100 yards from the beach, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EU warns Trump it would ‘respond firmly’ to tariffs
item.description: “The EU would respond firmly to any trading partner that unfairly or arbitrarily imposes tariffs on EU goods,” a spokesperson said. “There is a lot at stake.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Gaza ceasefire sees its smoothest exchange yet of Israeli hostages for Palestinian prisoners
item.description: KHAN YOUNIS, Gaza Strip (AP) — The ceasefire in Gaza saw its smoothest exchange yet of Israeli hostages for Palestinian prisoners on Saturday, and the crucial Rafah border crossing reopened two days before discussions on the truce’s far more difficult second phase begin.
item.dc:creator: MOHAMMAD JAHJOUH and IMAD ISSEID, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Arab nations reject Trump’s suggestion to relocate Palestinians from Gaza to Egypt and Jordan
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Powerful Arab nations on Saturday rejected U.S. President Donald Trump’s suggestion to relocate Palestinians from Gaza to neighboring Egypt and Jordan.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, NewsNation
